sentences.arabic: تَعَلُّمُ مَهَارَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلنَّجَاحِ الْمِهَنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Učenje novih vještina je neophodno za profesionalni uspjeh.
sentences.translationEn: Learning new skills is necessary for professional success.

sentences.arabic: أَحْضُرُ دَوْرَةً تَدْرِيبِيَّةً لِتَحْسِينِ مَهَارَاتِي فِي الْحَاسُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Pohađam kurs obuke kako bih poboljšao svoje vještine na računaru.
sentences.translationEn: I am attending a training course to improve my computer skills.

sentences.arabic: مُدِيرِي يُشَجِّعُنِي عَلَى تَعَلُّمِ شَيْءٍ جَدِيدٍ كُلَّ شَهْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Moj šef me ohrabruje da naučim nešto novo svakog mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: My boss encourages me to learn something new every month.
